Feature:AMO001 Get Member Wallet Balance 101ms 5

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant wallet balance API
So that I can retrieve the member wallet balance for one or more currencies

Scenario:
Get balances for requested currencies
39ms 4

Given a merchant member exists 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 38ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 30.625,
                "THB": 0
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 30.625,
                "THB": 0
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO001 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain balances for: < 1ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["CNY","THB"]

Validation fails when platform username is empty

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:

Info 

Setup:

        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 13ms
field value
platform_username
currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "platform_username",
                "message": "\"platform_username\" is not allowed to be empty"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance

                "message": "\"platform_username\" is not allowed to be empty"

Request:

        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:

          "platform_username": "invalid_username",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"

          "status": 404,
          "body": {

          }

        }

          "status": 400,

                "message": "\"currencies\" must contain at least 1 items"

Scenario:
Validation fails when a currency in the array is invalid
14ms 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 13ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["USD","MYR","INVALID"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "USD",
            "MYR",
            "INVALID"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "currencies.1",
                "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"
              },
              {
                "key": "currencies.2",
                "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:

          "currencies": [

            "MYR",
            "INVALID"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "currencies.1",
                "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"

Feature:AMO013 Notify Wager Update < 1ms 3

As APISYS
I want to notify the merchant of wager updates

Scenario:
Successful wager notification
< 1ms 2

When APISYS notifies wager update with: < 1ms 

{
  "notification_type": "typeA",
  "notifications": [
    {
      "game_type": "IMSPORT",
      "game_key": "IMSPORT",
      "wager_no": "0001-20250117140015-188011927396-3",
      "origin_wager_no": "0001-20250117140015-188011927396-1",
      "ticket_no": "ticketno_123",
      "platform_username": "member01",
      "type": 3,
      "status": 2,
      "currency": "CNY",
      "amount": 10.1,
      "payment_amount": 10.1,
      "effective_amount": 10,
      "profit_and_loss": 5.1,
      "wager_time": 1720694402,
      "settlement_time": 1720698600,
      "is_system_reward": true
    },
    {
      "game_type": "CRASH",
      "game_key": "CRASH_V2",
      "wager_no": "0002-20250117140015-188011927398-1",
      "origin_wager_no": null,
      "ticket_no": null,
      "platform_username": "member02",
      "type": 1,
      "status": 2,
      "currency": "CNY",
      "amount": 5.1,
      "payment_amount": 5.1,
      "effective_amount": 5,
      "profit_and_loss": 0,
      "wager_time": 1720694403,
      "settlement_time": null,
      "is_system_reward": false
    }
  ]
}
 

Then(/^APISYS notifies wager update with:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Then the AMO013 response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the AMO013 response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Feature:AMO003 Seamless Request Payment 278ms 5

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant request payment API
So that I can deduct wager payment from the member wallet

Scenario:
Successful request payment deducts wallet balance
111ms 8

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given the member has positive wallet balance in "<currency>" 21ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 30.625
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

    CNY:
        30.625

When APISYS requests payment with: 42ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
transaction_no <transaction_no>
currency <currency>

Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-payment
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "e2a3a078-3559-43b0-baf7-18b034d97d4a",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": -20.625
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "311a7dc4-210e-45c4-b5ed-d3157fc6fbbf",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Scenario:
Zero amount request payment is allowed
80ms 6

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>" 20ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 10
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        10

When APISYS requests payment with: 34ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
transaction_no <transaction_no>
currency <currency>
amount 0
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-payment
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "0872c77a-3704-49fd-aa7c-ea1cb8ec0f76",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": 0
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "e93caf3e-f3fe-4609-974c-c35d0919fe4c",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",

            "CNY"

        }

          "status": 200,
          "body": {

                "CNY": 10

    Before:

Scenario:
Validation fails when amount is positive
12ms 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests payment with: 11ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
transaction_no <transaction_no>
currency <currency>
amount 5
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-payment
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "f9173a26-ea02-4cc4-8c12-b8f8eab7c3ef",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": 5
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "\"amount\" must be a negative number"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-payment
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "f9173a26-ea02-4cc4-8c12-b8f8eab7c3ef",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": 5
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "\"amount\" must be a negative number"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

When APISYS requests payment with: 15ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
transaction_no <transaction_no>
currency <currency>
amount -1.1234567
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-payment
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "bc3f3f2e-8a4b-4657-8cf1-96a436fdd714",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": -1.1234567
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-payment
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "bc3f3f2e-8a4b-4657-8cf1-96a436fdd714",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": -1.1234567
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Then the AMO003 response should fail validation < 1ms

parent_wager_no <parent_wager_no>
payment_order_no <payment_order_no>

Feature:AMO007 Seamless Settle Wager 50ms 4

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant settle wager API
So that I can apply wager settlement results to the member wallet

Scenario:
Full settlement credits the wallet
18ms 2 2 2

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>" 17ms Show Info + 
Request:

    Payload:

          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 10
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

    CNY:

field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
currency <currency>
amount 25.75
is_partial_settlement false

  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Then the AMO007 response should be successful < 1ms

  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should increase by 25.75 < 1ms

  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');

field value
reference_id any non-empty value

    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "2049b24d-3c91-4d92-a724-10667079dce3",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO010 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id <amo010_reference_id>
status 1

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should remain unchanged 23ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 135.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "3e66c941-b5c4-4581-8a33-5c5a11051937",
          "game_type": "",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "1.1234567",
          "session_id": "93e761e0-935f-4ff1-985f-a6cdba626c43"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

              "reference_id": "8b0773f7-b1b9-499f-a90c-886f599fbef7",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

          "transfer_no": "03de79e1-55a1-443a-87e7-7790c52e24a6",

Feature:AMO011 Request Transfer Out 607ms 7 2 2

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant transfer out API
So that I can debit funds from the member wallet

Scenario:
Transfer out decreases wallet balance
116ms 6 1

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given the member has positive wallet balance in "<currency>" 36ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 155.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        155.125

Info

    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:

          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:

          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 155.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

When APISYS requests transfer out with: 50ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -20.5
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "8fd29632-522a-45df-ae30-cf601b68aa72",
          "game_type": "",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-20.5",
          "session_id": "dde3e7e9-554c-4340-b922-74e9a34d1392"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "5e7a4a49-baf4-450f-bb65-c6732d00cb44",
              "amount": -20.5,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "8fd29632-522a-45df-ae30-cf601b68aa72",
          "game_type": "",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-20.5",
          "session_id": "dde3e7e9-554c-4340-b922-74e9a34d1392"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "5e7a4a49-baf4-450f-bb65-c6732d00cb44",
              "amount": -20.5,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
amount -20.5
status 1

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should decrease by 20.5 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance in "([^"]*)" should decrease by 20.5$/, function(arg1, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Repeating the same transfer_no is idempotent

field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -15
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "da0f7ac8-ce91-4adc-929a-a37ef4aeec3a",
          "game_type": "",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-15",
          "session_id": "d9592133-049a-46bc-a5ab-9ff50baf38e0"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "1d91276f-1f47-45b2-bd5d-db192cc67f90",
              "amount": -15,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"

        }

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
amount -15
status 1

And I store the response field "reference_id" as "amo011_reference_id" < 1ms

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should decrease by 15 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance in "([^"]*)" should decrease by 15$/, function(arg1, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Given I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>" < 1ms

field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -15
session_id <session_id>

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id <amo011_reference_id>
amount -15
status 1

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should remain unchanged < 1ms

        }

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
status 1

And the response amount should equal the integer part of the recorded wallet balance in "<currency>" < 1ms

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should equal the remaining decimal balance 33ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 0.625
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Remaining decimal check:
    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        119.625
    After:
        0.625
    Expected:
        0.625

Info

    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 0.625
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Remaining decimal check:
    Currency:

        119.625
    After:
        0.625
    Expected:
        0.625

When APISYS requests transfer out with: 15ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>

session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "535fba21-4627-4f69-993d-602a6baef622",
          "game_type": "",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-1.1234567",
          "session_id": "b19b71e5-9fbe-4356-8906-dac74c6a3885"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Feature:AMO014 Request Cancel Transfer 28ms 3

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant cancel transfer API
So that I can reverse a previous transfer ledger

Scenario:
Cancel transfer returns reference_id for an existing transfer in and is idempotent
< 1ms 1 5 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:

field value

field value
reference_id any non-empty value

Scenario:
Cancel transfer returns reference_id for an existing transfer out and is idempotent
27ms 2 5 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given the member has positive wallet balance in "<currency>" 26ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 0.625
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        0.625

So that repeated cancel calls behave consistently

Transfer in then cancel twice returns the same reference_id
98ms 5 4 4

field value
platform_username <platform_username>

amount 30
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "transfer_no": "2b74a5cd-310e-4a7c-820d-1e1921ec3a44",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "30"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "bf05f036-a0be-4ddc-82a7-1cea48ea6d0b",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info

Feature:Integration Flow - Transfer out all integer balance < 1ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant transfer APIs in sequence
So that I can verify full integer-balance withdrawal behavior end to end

Scenario:
Transfer in 120.5 then transfer out without amount deducts 120 and leaves 0.5
< 1ms 7 4

Given a merchant member exists with platform username "<platform_username>" < 1ms 

Then(/^a merchant member exists with platform username "([^"]*)"$/, function(arg1, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests transfer in with: < 1ms
transfer_no
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 120.5

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the wallet balance for "<platform_username>" in "<currency>" should become 120.5 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance for "([^"]*)" in "([^"]*)" should become 120.5$/, function(arg1, arg2, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests transfer out with: < 1ms
transfer_no
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain: < 1ms
status success
amount 120

And the wallet balance for "<platform_username>" in "<currency>" should become 0.5 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance for "([^"]*)" in "([^"]*)" should become 0.5$/, function(arg1, arg2, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: < 1ms
platform_username
currencies <currency>

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain balances: < 1ms
0.5 

Then(/^the response should contain balances:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Feature:Integration Flow - Transfer lifecycle through merchant wallet APIs < 1ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant wallet APIs in sequence
So that I can verify transfer credit, debit, reversal, and balance retrieval end to end

Scenario:
Transfer in 100, get balance, transfer out 35, get balance, cancel transfer, get balance
< 1ms 14 8

Given a merchant member exists with platform username "<platform_username>" < 1ms 

Then(/^a merchant member exists with platform username "([^"]*)"$/, function(arg1, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

transfer_no
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 100

Then the response should be successful < 1ms

  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain: < 1ms
status success

And the wallet balance for "<platform_username>" in "<currency>" should become 100 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance for "([^"]*)" in "([^"]*)" should become 100$/, function(arg1, arg2, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: < 1ms
platform_username
currencies <currency>

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain balances: < 1ms
100 

Then(/^the response should contain balances:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});
